info.title: Zapper API
info.description: Enterprise grade onchain data across 60+ chains — token prices, NFTs, portfolios, transactions, and more.
info.x-guidance: All paid endpoints are at POST /x402/{tool}. Send a JSON body with the required fields for the tool. Payment is required via x402 (X-Payment header, Base USDC) or MPP (Authorization: Payment header, Tempo). Available tools: token-price, search, nft-token-metadata, nft-collection-metadata, portfolio-totals, token-balances, defi-balances, nft-balances, historical-token-price, transaction-details, transaction-history, token-holders, token-ranking, nft-ranking, account-identity, general-swap-feed, token-activity-feed.

post.summary: Get real-time token price and market cap
Search for ERC20 tokens, NFTs, Users, Apps, or Gas Tokens.

search.description: Search query (e.g., "Ape", "eth", "Vitalik"). Searches for token SYMBOLS, NFT collection names, ENS, and BaseNames.

categories.description: Filter results by category. Use multiple categories for broader results (e.g., ["GAS_TOKEN", "ERC20_TOKEN"] for all token types). Defaults to ERC20_TOKEN only.

results.description: Polymorphic list of results. Fields depend on the category.

items.description: A single search result (App, User, Token, or NFT)
